02 — About

I’m a Strategic Product Manager with over 13 years of experience at the intersection of pharmaceutical regulation, clinical outcomes, and enterprise health technology. My work sits where FDA compliance meets sprint planning — where a patient’s journey through rare disease treatment is shaped by the product decisions I make.

I started my career as a Medical Representative at Roche, launching Avastin® and earning a “Star Performer” award. That on-the-ground clinical experience became the foundation of everything I’ve built since — a deep understanding that behind every data model, every workflow, every release, there is a patient waiting.

I’ve led product delivery across six companies and five countries — from India’s largest oncology patient support program at Novartis (serving 100,000+ patients) to scaling a direct-to-patient CRM across the NHS and US markets during COVID-19. At Syneos Health, I govern a $2.5M+ REMS portfolio of 8+ FDA-regulated programs on Salesforce Healthcloud, with zero critical post-deployment defects.

I hold an MBA, PMP®, and PSPO® certification, and I’m a Qualified Pharmacist. I work in the grey zone between business and engineering — translating complex regulatory requirements into sprint-ready stories that teams can actually ship. I build products that are compliant by design, not by accident.

03 — What I Do

Core Capabilities

🔗
Product Strategy & Roadmapping

Translating complex healthcare regulations and clinical requirements into sprint-ready stories. I bridge business and technology — speaking fluently to both executive stakeholders and engineering teams to align delivery with commercial and patient outcomes.

REMSHealthcloudAgile
🛡️
Regulatory Product Delivery

Deep instinct for 21 CFR Part 11, GXP, HIPAA, and FDA compliance built into every feature decision — not bolted on at the end. I govern UAT and Computer System Validation for all platform releases, ensuring zero critical post-deployment defects across regulated programs.

21 CFR Part 11FDAGXP
⚡
Salesforce Health Platforms

Hands-on delivery across Salesforce Healthcloud, Life Sciences Cloud, Agentforce AI, and Marketing Cloud. From patient journey design to enterprise CRM migrations across 30+ brands and $1.2M+ budgets — building intelligent, patient-centric digital health solutions.

HealthcloudMarketing CloudAgentforce
🌍
Global Launch Execution

Proven track record scaling digital health products across the US, UK, Canada, India, and Europe — including NHS adoption — navigating multi-market regulatory and commercial complexity. Promoted from Sr. Manager to Associate Director in 8 months on demonstrated product leadership.

Multi-marketNHS UKEnterprise
04 — Featured Work

Products & Impact

Case Study
MT
Building FDA-Compliant REMS on Salesforce Healthcloud

Delivered 8+ FDA REMS programs including Genentech’s rare disease brand Piasky (Crovalimab) at Syneos Health — $2.5M+ portfolio with zero critical post-deployment defects across patient and prescriber platforms.

Rare Disease · REMS · Syneos Health
Case Study
MT
Scaling a Direct-to-Patient CRM Across 5 Countries

Led product build for Treated.com — enabling remote diagnosis for 100,000s of patients during COVID-19 across UK, US, Canada, India & France including NHS adoption. Promoted to Associate Director in 8 months on demonstrated product leadership and platform growth.

Patient CRM · UK · US · Canada
Case Study
MT
First ADA-Endorsed SaMD for Diabetes Care

Senior Program Manager at Wellthy Therapeutics — launched India’s first ADA-endorsed Software as a Medical Device for diabetes care, using Salesforce Healthcloud for patient journeys and spanning full regulatory approval and KOL engagement.

SaMD · Wellthy · Salesforce
